sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46329" key="zugomaxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῠγο-μᾰχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quarrelling, strife</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
